Choose Your Program
Built for your timeline.

Every program runs the same proven on-ramp and throwing protocol. Pick the length that fits your off-season window.

4 weeks

Arm wake-up. Build throw capacity from the ground up. Perfect for a short window before a showcase or camp.

Most Popular
8 weeks

Complete on-ramp. Full throw buildup to 120ft + pull-downs. Free for first 250 waitlist + all Blaze athletes.

12 weeks

On-ramp + bullpen phase for pitchers. Position players return to unrestricted throwing. Full strength block.

16 weeks

The full off-season. On-ramp, velocity phase, transition, and full bullpen development. Built for serious players.

What PlayerOS Does
Your system. Every day.

Not a workout app. Not a YouTube playlist. A daily operating system that tells you exactly what to do — and why.

⚾
Throwing Protocol

Structured daily sessions with exact throw counts, distances, and pull-down sequences. Built for arm health and velocity development.

🏋️
Position-Specific Lifting

Speed, strength, velocity, or power — your goal drives the program. Lower and upper body blocks that rotate every session.

🩺
Arm Care Built In

Phase-aware arm care after every session. Not optional. Adapts to where you are in your program and how hard you threw.

📱
Daily Check-In

Tell the app how you feel, what you did yesterday, and whether you have a game today. The plan adjusts. Every single day.

🎯
Goal Tracking

Input your baselines at the start. Track velocity, exit velo, 60-yard dash, and body weight across your entire program.

▶️
Video For Every Exercise

145+ exercise videos. Every lift, arm care drill, and mobility movement has a Watch button so form is never a question.

🏆
Leaderboard

Compete with athletes across the platform. Points for completed workouts, check-ins, and progress photos. Your handle, your rank.

🤖
AI Coaching

Ask anything about your program, recovery, mechanics, or nutrition. Built on your full athlete profile so the answers are specific to you — not generic advice.

Why I Built This
"The moment I bought into structure and consistency is the moment everything changed."

I grew up in Kennesaw, Georgia — metro Atlanta, surrounded by good coaches, travel programs, and every resource a baseball player could ask for. I had the tools. What I was missing was a real plan. At 14, I stopped just showing up and started building a structure — daily throwing programs, position-specific lifting, intentional arm care. Once I committed to that consistency, the gains were undeniable.

That structure carried me through 7 years of professional baseball. Drafted by the Miami Marlins in 2018, Double-A, MLB Spring Training — none of it happens without the daily discipline I built as a teenager.

Now I coach at Blaze Baseball in Atlanta. Every week I see talented kids with everything they need except one thing — a system. Random workouts. No throwing protocol. Arm care as an afterthought. The talent is there. The structure isn't.

PlayerOS is that structure. Built from everything I learned across my playing career and the pro-level knowledge I brought back to coaching. Not motivation. Not hype. A daily operating system that tells you exactly what to do and why — for athletes ages 13–18 who are serious about the next level.

Structure over motivation. Every single day.

Justin Evans
Founder, PlayerOS · Miami Marlins Draftee 2018 · Coach, Blaze Baseball Atlanta
